home.main-subtitle: I play games. Lots of games.
home.presentation:
Hi, I'm KGΛMΞX.

I'm a student in Computer Science.

When I talk online, I enrole a stickman originally named Blue.

I play a lot of video games, especially Beat Saber, on which I'm ranked in the top 1.9% worldwide.

When I don't have my VR headset, I play other games like Geometry Dash, Minecraft and Mario Kart.
home.tools-presentation:
Throughout university and personal projects, I learned various tools for multiple purposes.

Some of them include :

  • Visual Studio Code and IntelliJ IDEA for programming ;
  • Inkscape for graphic design ;
  • Shotcut for video editing ;
  • Unity for game development.
